Metadata.title: Monthly Saju - AI saju life coach
Metadata.description: An AI saju life coach that helps you reflect on today, relationships, money flow, and monthly patterns.
Metadata.keywords: Monthly Saju,AI saju,saju counseling,daily fortune,monthly report,relationship reading

Auth.loginDescription: Continue safely with your Google account.
Auth.softAgreement: By logging in, you agree to the <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

service.content: Monthly Saju provides AI-assisted astrology and saju counseling based on birth date, birth time, gender, and user concerns. The Service is designed for self-reflection and entertainment-supported guidance, and does not replace medical, legal, financial, or psychological advice from qualified professionals.

account.content: You may need to sign in with Google OAuth to use the Service. You are responsible for keeping your account secure. If you notice unauthorized use, contact corisarang@gmail.com.

subscription.content: Monthly Saju may provide free starter credits and paid star packages for continued counseling. Payments are processed by Paddle. Billing and refund requests can be sent to corisarang@gmail.com.

usageLimits.content: Free credits and paid stars are deducted according to the rules shown in the Service. Automated bulk usage, unauthorized use of another person's information, or activity that harms service stability may be restricted.

aiContent.content: AI responses are generated from the saju data and conversation context you provide. Outputs may contain mistakes or interpretive differences, so important decisions should also consider real-world conditions and professional advice.

ip.content: The Service interface, characters, counseling copy, software, and related intellectual property belong to Monthly Saju or its licensors. For intellectual property inquiries, contact corisarang@gmail.com.

liability.content: The Service is provided as available. Monthly Saju does not guarantee completeness, accuracy, or any specific outcome from counseling results, and is not responsible for decisions made solely based on AI-generated guidance.

termination.content: You may request account and data deletion at any time through the Service or by contacting corisarang@gmail.com. Some records may be retained where required by law.

contact.content: For terms, billing, account, or deletion requests, contact corisarang@gmail.com.

introduction.content: Monthly Saju cares about user privacy. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, why we use it, and how we protect it.

collection.content: When you sign in with Google, we may collect your name, email address, and profile image. For counseling, we may store your name, birth date, birth time, gender, concerns, and conversation history. Payment method details are processed by Paddle and are not stored by Monthly Saju.

howWeUse.content: We use information to manage accounts, provide saju counseling, keep counseling history, process payments, maintain service stability, and improve product quality. Birth date and gender are used for saju calculation and counseling context, not sold for advertising.

dataSharing.content: Monthly Saju does not sell personal information. Service providers such as Supabase, AI providers, Paddle, and Vercel may process limited data only for operating the Service.

dataSecurity.content: We use reasonable safeguards such as encrypted transmission, access controls, and authentication protections. No internet service can remove every risk completely.

yourRights.content: You may request access, correction, deletion, or restriction of your personal information. Data deletion requests can be sent to corisarang@gmail.com.

dataRetention.content: Account information and counseling history are retained while the Service is provided and deleted after account deletion or deletion request, except where legal retention is required.

CookieConsent.message: We use cookies required to run the service.

FeedbackWidget.title: Send feedback
FeedbackWidget.subtitle: Tell us what felt unclear or what you want next.
